name: FileZilla – Installation Key
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts for commonly abused tools with specific registry footprints: PsExec (temporary service key on target), FileZilla (FTP exfiltration), MEGASync (cloud exfiltration with autorun), Advanced IP Scanner (writes even as portable; operational history including scanned IP ranges), and NetSupport Manager (RMM abused as RAT). Includes artifact tips and companion file artifacts.
description: [FileZilla] FileZilla FTP/SFTP client installation registry key. Contains version information and install path.
forensic_value: FileZilla is frequently used for data exfiltration via FTP/SFTP. Installation key proves FileZilla was installed. Check FileZilla XML config files for saved sites/credentials: %APPDATA%\FileZilla\sitemanager.xml and recentservers.xml — these may contain cleartext or base64 FTP server credentials and IP addresses.
